title: thymus fallax var. daenensis
intro: Thymus fallax var. daenensis, also known as Korean thyme, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Korea and other parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Thymus fallax var. daenensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and modern herbal remedies.
